asset_universe.north_star_requirement: Every operator-visible opportunity should carry a canonical asset id or an explicit diagnostic reason.
asset_universe.role: Defines the tradable asset universe and filters out quotes, sectors, themes, and proxy-only assets unless explicitly labeled.

calibration_source_yield_loop.north_star_requirement: All prior and threshold suggestions must carry auto_apply=false until a separate explicit decision changes policy.
calibration_source_yield_loop.role: Reports lane/provider/source-pack usefulness, noise, and maturation rates as recommendations-only priors.

derivatives_crowding_layer.north_star_requirement: Crowding warnings and fade-review evidence must be derived from deterministic derivatives state rows.
derivatives_crowding_layer.role: Adds OI, funding, liquidations, long/short, basis, and perp/spot crowding evidence when provider artifacts exist.

evidence_acquisition.north_star_requirement: Evidence can upgrade research confidence only through deterministic source-pack sufficiency gates.
evidence_acquisition.role: Targets missing source packs for near-misses and hypotheses without changing thresholds or routes automatically.

human_labeling_inbox.north_star_requirement: Labels are burn-in training evidence only and should shrink as provider/source yield improves.
human_labeling_inbox.role: Focuses human review on active-learning gaps, near-misses, duplicates, source noise, and missing confirmation.

market_anomaly_scanner.north_star_requirement: Market anomaly alone remains unconfirmed until structured or official evidence confirms the why-now.
market_anomaly_scanner.role: Finds broad market-first moves and creates catalyst-search queue items before promotion.

market_state_builder.north_star_requirement: Freshness and unit metadata must travel with state; stale state cannot promote fade-review or confirmed lanes.
market_state_builder.role: Builds return, volume, liquidity, freshness, and relative-market context for candidates.

opportunity_lane_classifier.north_star_requirement: A lane is a research workflow label, not an instruction to trade.
opportunity_lane_classifier.role: Assigns candidates to research lanes based on evidence, market state, derivatives, freshness, and source strength.

outcome_tracker.north_star_requirement: Outcomes measure future behavior; they do not auto-apply thresholds.
outcome_tracker.role: Matures rows with future market behavior labels for lane/source/provider usefulness analysis.

policy_routing_gates.north_star_requirement: No route may bypass research-only/no-send guards, and Event Alpha never writes normal RSI rows or TRIGGERED_FADE.
policy_routing_gates.role: Applies quality, freshness, dedupe, source-strength, no-send, and safety blockers before any preview or delivery row.

research_cards_notifications.north_star_requirement: Copy must preserve research-only and not-a-trade-signal framing.
research_cards_notifications.role: Produces operator-facing cards, daily brief sections, and guarded/no-send notification previews.

resolver.north_star_requirement: Quote assets, simple BTC/ETH pair noise, and SECTOR/theme entities are capped or diagnostic by default.
resolver.role: Maps tickers, coin ids, exchange symbols, Coinalyze markets, and future contract/pool ids into canonical asset identity.

source_ingestion.north_star_requirement: Provider rows must preserve source URL, title/body evidence, published time, provider health, and no-live-default request posture.
source_ingestion.role: Collects official, structured, derivatives, market, protocol, and context evidence through fixture-first provider paths.

freeze_criteria: any lane has unresolved strict blockers
provider evidence is missing from cards or source coverage

CONFIRMED_LONG_RESEARCH: continuation/outcome rate beats unconfirmed baseline with minimum samples
official/structured proof is present in cards and doctor checks
crowding warnings visible when derivatives are elevated
DIAGNOSTIC: diagnostic rows remain excluded from main performance aggregates
EARLY_LONG_RESEARCH: sufficient fresh source evidence and market sanity across burn-in samples
no strict blockers for stale market state or missing source plan
FADE_SHORT_REVIEW: exhaustion outcomes mature with crowding evidence present
no Event Alpha-created TRIGGERED_FADE or normal RSI row side effects
RISK_ONLY: risk validation rate is useful and materiality fields are complete
risk rows do not leak into long lanes
UNCONFIRMED_RESEARCH: later-confirmation/noise rates identify useful source packs
unconfirmed rows stay out of strict alert routes

human_labeling.mature_system_goal: reduce labeling burden by using source-yield, near-miss, and outcome evidence to target only uncertain rows
not_allowed: manual labels do not auto-change thresholds
manual labels do not authorize sends, trades, paper trades, RSI writes, or TRIGGERED_FADE creation
human_labeling.outcomes_answer: future market behavior after the research row matures

CONFIRMED_LONG_RESEARCH.allowed_notification_route: strict alert candidate only through guarded no-send rehearsal and send-readiness gates
market_requirements: crowding warning is visible if derivatives show elevated crowding
strict_blockers: confirmed without source plus market confirmation
no delivery ledger in live-call-allowed path
what_confirms: official listing/perp/product/calendar evidence plus market response
structured source validates catalyst timing and asset
derivatives crowding is moderate or explicitly warned
what_invalidates: confirmed lane depends only on context/news

market_requirements: diagnostic market state may be recorded for audit only
required_evidence: reason row is not an opportunity
strict_blockers: DIAGNOSTIC included in main performance aggregate
diagnostic row visible in default operator section
what_confirms: row improves filters or source-quality rules
what_invalidates: diagnostic row appears as tradable opportunity
quote asset or SECTOR is visible as target asset

EARLY_LONG_RESEARCH.allowed_notification_route: research_review_digest or guarded no-send preview; strict send only after separate readiness approval
market_requirements: move is not already fully completed
crowding is not extreme after the move
required_evidence: fresh official/structured catalyst or strong accepted source-pack evidence
market state is fresh enough to rule out stale promotion
strict_blockers: missing canonical id when resolver fixture has it
what_confirms: market reaction is early or orderly
what_invalidates: asset match is ticker-only or theme/sector diagnostic
move is late with extreme crowding

FADE_SHORT_REVIEW.allowed_notification_route: research-review/no-send preview only; never Event Alpha-created TRIGGERED_FADE
market_requirements: OI/funding/liquidation/perp-spot evidence indicates crowding or exhaustion
required_evidence: fresh derivatives state when derivatives are part of the proof
what_confirms: crowding candidate and fade-review candidate share symbol/canonical id
event has passed or move has completed
card includes evidence and not-a-trade-signal wording
what_invalidates: normal RSI or TRIGGERED_FADE side effects

RISK_ONLY.allowed_notification_route: risk review section or no-send preview; not strict long alert
market_requirements: unlock/supply risk includes time and materiality metrics
required_evidence: structured source or strong source-pack evidence
explicit reason the row is not long research
strict_blockers: missing size metrics promoted to risk/fade
what_confirms: unlock, delisting, security, regulatory, or fundamentals deterioration evidence is structured
what_invalidates: missing size/materiality metrics for unlock/supply risk
risk row promoted as early/confirmed long

UNCONFIRMED_RESEARCH.allowed_notification_route: research-review digest only; no strict alert
market_requirements: market move can be observed but does not prove catalyst identity
required_evidence: market anomaly, context, or weak catalyst evidence
explicit source plan or catalyst-search queue item
what_confirms: official, structured, derivatives, DEX, protocol, or accepted source-pack evidence arrives
human label says useful and missing confirmation is later resolved

purpose: Align future Event Alpha work around a measurable crypto market radar and 30-day no-send burn-in contract.
